<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band13_chunk005.pdf#page=1 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band13 p200 -->

EICHSTÄTT STADTRESIDEN TOTICE ATT CTADTRECIDENT


[[File:Band13_chunk005_p001_img001.jpg|thumb|Pax und Iustitia, Ausschnitt aus dem Spiegelsaalfresko]]



[[File:Band13_chunk005_p001_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band13 p201 -->
